mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM local_activity_enrollment WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND status IN ('confirmed', 'checked_in', 'completed')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM local_activity_enrollment WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND status = 'waitlist'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO local_activity_enrollment (activity_id, user_id, status, waitlist_rank, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{waitlistRank}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE local_activity_enrollment SET status = #{status}, waitlist_rank = #{waitlistRank}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, status, waitlist_rank FROM local_activity_enrollment WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND status = 'waitlist' ORDER BY waitlist_rank ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
